title: AssetRecipe
description:
Wraps an EE Image or ImageCollection asset as a SEPAL recipe â€” visualizable, maskable, filterable, compositable, usable as input to other recipes (classification, change detection), exportable through the standard pipeline.

**Minimum model.** Asset id is nested under `assetDetails`, NOT at the top level:
```json
{"aoi": {"type":"ASSET_BOUNDS"}, "assetDetails": {"assetId": "GOOGLE/SATELLITE_EMBEDDING/V1/ANNUAL"}}
```
A common LLM mistake is `{assetId, aoi}` at the top â€” fails validation with `must have required property 'assetDetails'`. Always wrap.

**Two modes** by `assetDetails.type`:
- `Image` â€” single image; applies `mask` + clips to AOI; `dates`, `filter`, `composite` ignored.
- `ImageCollection` â€” filters by AOI bounds, optionally `dates`, optionally property `filter`, applies `mask` per image, reduces via `composite.type`.

LLM doesn't need to set `type`/`bands`/`visualizations`/`metadata` â€” GUI auto-loads from EE on open.

**AOI.** Only recipe that allows the `ASSET_BOUNDS` variant (use the asset's own geometry); EE_TABLE / POLYGON also valid for clipping to a smaller area.

aoi.description: Area of Interest. `ASSET_BOUNDS` (asset's intrinsic geometry, only valid here), or EE_TABLE / POLYGON for clipping.

assetDetails.title: AssetDetails
assetDetails.description:
EE asset + GUI-hydrated metadata. **Asset id MUST be `assetDetails.assetId` â€” NOT top-level.** When creating, set only `assetId`; GUI hydrates `type`/`bands`/`visualizations`/`metadata` from EE on open.

Note: retrieval needs `assetDetails.type` ('Image' or 'ImageCollection'). If retrieved before the GUI opens the recipe to hydrate, fails with `Invalid asset type: undefined`. GUI handles this transparently.

assetId.description:
EE asset path. Forms: `users//`, `projects/

/assets/`, or catalog `//`. Use `asset_search` to resolve from a dataset name.

type.description: GUI-hydrated. Image ignores `dates`/`filter`/`composite`; ImageCollection uses them. Don't set unless you know with certainty.

bands.description: GUI-hydrated. LLM doesn't set when creating.

visualizations.description: Visualization presets cached from the asset. GUI-hydrated. Don't set.

metadata.description: Full EE metadata blob. GUI-hydrated. Don't set.

dates.title: AssetDates
dates.description:
ImageCollection date filter (ignored for Image assets).
- `ALL_DATES` (default) â€” no filter.
- `YEAR` â€” calendar year. GUI persists as `fromDate=<year>-01-01`, `toDate=<year+1>-01-01` (start-of-next-year via half-open `[fromDate, toDate)`).
- `CUSTOM_DATE_RANGE` â€” explicit `fromDate`/`toDate`. Same half-open semantics â€” scenes ON `toDate` NOT included.

fromDate.description: Inclusive start. Required for YEAR / CUSTOM_DATE_RANGE. Earliest 1970-01-01 (GUI's lower bound).

toDate.description: Exclusive end â€” set to day AFTER last covered day. Full year 2024: `2025-01-01` (NOT `2024-12-31`). Required for YEAR / CUSTOM_DATE_RANGE. Latest today.

allOf.description: fromDate and toDate required when type is YEAR or CUSTOM_DATE_RANGE.

composite.title: AssetComposite
composite.description: ImageCollection â†’ single image reduction (ignored for Image assets).

type.description:
Reducer.
- `MOSAIC` (default) â€” last-image-wins per pixel; preserves a single observation, original values intact.
- `MEDIAN` â€” per-band per-pixel median. Robust to outliers; standard for clean composites.
- `MEAN` â€” per-band per-pixel mean. Outlier-sensitive.
- `MIN`/`MAX` â€” per-band per-pixel extreme. Useful for min-cloudiness, max-greenness.
- `SD` â€” per-band stdDev across collection. Output is variability rather than representative value.
- `MODE` â€” per-band most-frequent. For categorical bands (class labels) where averaging is meaningless.

filter.title: AssetFilter
filter.description: ImageCollection metadata filter applied per-image *before* compositing (ignored for Image). Each `filtersEntry` is a constraint group joined by `booleanOperator`; multiple entries combined with AND. Filter constraints reference image *properties* (`CLOUD_COVER`, `system:time_start`); mask constraints reference *bands*.

mask.title: AssetMask
mask.description: Per-pixel band-value mask (every image for Image asset; every image in collection for ImageCollection). Each `constraintsEntry` is a constraint group joined by `booleanOperator`; multiple entries combined with AND. Operates on band *values* (vs `filter` on metadata properties); supports `class`, `range`, comparisons, plus optional bitwise extraction (`bit`/`fromBit`/`toBit`/inclusive flags) for QA bitmask bands.

constraintsEntry.title: AssetConstraintsEntry
constraintsEntry.description: Constraint group joined by `booleanOperator`. Used by both `filter.filtersEntries[*]` and `mask.constraintsEntries[*]`; per-constraint shape differs (filter uses `property`, mask uses `image`+`band`).

id.description: UUID for stable React keys; lookup path when panel updates the entry.

booleanOperator.description: Combine constraints within entry. `and` = all required; `or` = any.

constraint.title: AssetConstraint
constraint.description:
Single comparison.
- Filter: `{property, operator, value | range fields}`. Operator âˆˆ {`<`, `â‰¤`, `>`, `â‰¥`, `=`, `range`}. NO `class` (image properties aren't categorical).
- Mask: `{image, band, operator, value | range fields | selectedClasses}` plus optional bit-extraction. Operator âˆˆ {`class`, `<`, `â‰¤`, `>`, `â‰¥`, `=`, `range`}.

`â‰¤`/`â‰¥` are unicode U+2264/U+2265.

description.description: GUI-only summary; not read by backend.

image.description: Mask only. Always literal `'this-recipe'` (mask references bands of the asset itself).

band.description: Mask only. Band name (must be one of `assetDetails.bands[*].id`).

operator.description: `class` = mask-only categorical match against `selectedClasses`. `range` = `from`/`to` with inclusive flags. `=` works for both filter (string or numeric property) and mask (numeric band).

selectedClasses.description: Required for `class` (mask only). Match if band value is any.

value.description: RHS for `<`/`â‰¤`/`>`/`â‰¥`/`=`. Numeric for mask; numeric or string for filter (depending on property type).

bit.description: Mask only. `true` = compare bitwise extraction of band value (for QA bitmask bands like Landsat `QA_PIXEL`); requires `fromBit`/`toBit`/`fromBitInclusive`/`toBitInclusive`.

allOf.description: Range operator requires from, to, fromInclusive, toInclusive.
bit=true requires fromBit, toBit, and inclusive flags.
